.NET P/Invoke bindings for tree-sitter-language-pack.

## Installation

```sh
dotnet add package TreeSitterLanguagePack
```

## Quick Start

```text
using TreeSitterLanguagePack;

// List all available languages
var languages = TsPackClient.AvailableLanguages();
Console.WriteLine($"Languages: {languages.Length}");

// Check if a language is available
Console.WriteLine(TsPackClient.HasLanguage("csharp")); // true

// Process source code
var result = TsPackClient.Process(source, new ProcessConfig { Language = "csharp" });
Console.WriteLine($"Structure: {result.Structure.Count}");
```

## API Reference

### Language Discovery

- `available_languages()` -- list all supported language names
- `has_language(name)` -- check if a language is available
- `language_count()` -- total number of supported languages

### Parsing

- `get_parser(name)` / `parse_string(source, language)` -- parse source code into a syntax tree

### Intelligence

- `process(source, config)` -- extract structured analysis (functions, classes, imports, comments, chunks) from source code

For detailed API documentation, see the [.NET (C#) package](https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack/tree/main/packages/csharp/TreeSitterLanguagePack).
